creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Yuri,

misc/usd still depends on old devel/tbb port.

Newer versions of usd seem to support oneTbb (see: https://github.com/PixarAnimationStudios/OpenUSD/commit/9010646b9f1b49edabc7c59b9a917b9e513ef162 present since v24.08).

Could you update the port to depend on devel/onetbb instead of devel/tbb please ?

Thanks in advance,

Best regards,

Ganael.
